name: python3-envs
title: python3-envs
summary: Easy access to environment variables in Python
description:
Easy access to environment variables in Python
This library provides easy access to environment variables via
Python objects instead of just strings.
.
It has support for booleans, strings, lists, tuples, integers, floats, and
dicts.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-envs because Easy access to environment variables in Python.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-envs as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-envs with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-envs --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
